summary: P2 Feature: Drag & drop photo reordering + editable captions in building detail view. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: Login, Batiments page, building detail modal with Galerie Photos section all working correctly. No 'Photos' button in Batiments page (old mode removed as expected).
critical_code_review_comments: GaleriePhotosBatiment.jsx: Well-structured component with HTML5 drag & drop, editable legends, and save functionality
Backend PUT /prevention/batiments/{id}/photos/reorder endpoint works correctly with empty arrays and photo data
Batiments.jsx: 'Photos' button removed (old ReassignPhotos mode removed as requested)
BatimentDetailModalNew.jsx: GaleriePhotosBatiment integrated at line 2546 in building detail modal
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing data (71 buildings, most with empty photos array)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 photo reorder feature verified. GaleriePhotosBatiment.jsx provides drag & drop reordering and editable captions. Backend endpoint PUT /prevention/batiments/{id}/photos/reorder works. Building with photo_url: id starts with 1f1623c4. Most buildings have empty photos array.

features_verified: Component renders in building detail modal
Empty state message when no photos

batiments_page.details: Page loads with Liste/Carte toggle, 71 buildings displayed, no 'Photos' button (old mode removed)

building_detail_modal.details: Modal opens on row click, shows Localisation, Contacts, and Galerie Photos sections

features: HTML5 drag & drop with dragStart, dragEnd, dragOver, drop handlers
Save button appears only when changes made (hasChanges state)
Fullscreen photo viewer with keyboard navigation
Accepts photos array with id and legende
Preserves photos not in update list
